description_fr: Mario, Zelda, Tetris, Fortnite, GTA. Les jeux cultes et leurs studios.
description_en: Mario, Zelda, Tetris, Fortnite, GTA. Iconic games and their studios.

questions.question_fr: Quel personnage est la mascotte de Nintendo ?
questions.explanation_fr: Mario est apparu en 1981 dans Donkey Kong. Plombier moustachu en salopette rouge.
questions.explanation_en: Mario first appeared in Donkey Kong (1981). Mustachioed plumber in red overalls.

questions.question_fr: Quel pays a inventé le jeu Tetris ?
questions.explanation_fr: Tetris a été créé en 1984 par Alexey Pajitnov en URSS.
questions.explanation_en: Tetris was created in 1984 by Alexey Pajitnov in the USSR.

questions.question_fr: Minecraft est le jeu vidéo le plus vendu de tous les temps.
questions.question_en: Minecraft is the best-selling video game of all time.
questions.explanation_fr: Minecraft a dépassé 300 millions d'exemplaires vendus depuis 2011.
questions.explanation_en: Minecraft has sold over 300 million copies since 2011.

questions.question_fr: Dans quel jeu doit-on capturer 'tous' les monstres ?
questions.question_en: In which game must you 'catch them all'?
questions.explanation_fr: Pokémon de Game Freak (Nintendo) avec son slogan 'Attrapez-les tous'.
questions.explanation_en: Pokémon by Game Freak (Nintendo) with its slogan 'Gotta catch 'em all'.

questions.question_fr: Quel studio a créé The Legend of Zelda ?
questions.question_en: Which studio created The Legend of Zelda?
questions.explanation_fr: The Legend of Zelda a été créé par Shigeru Miyamoto chez Nintendo en 1986.
questions.explanation_en: The Legend of Zelda was created by Shigeru Miyamoto at Nintendo in 1986.

questions.question_fr: Le jeu de bataille royale d'Epic Games le plus populaire s'appelle ___.
questions.question_en: The most popular battle royale game by Epic Games is ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Fortnite est sorti en 2017 et a popularisé le mode battle royale (100 joueurs).
questions.explanation_en: Fortnite launched in 2017 and popularized the battle royale mode (100 players).

questions.question_fr: Quel personnage hérisson bleu est la mascotte de Sega ?
questions.question_en: Which blue hedgehog is Sega's mascot?
questions.explanation_fr: Sonic the Hedgehog est sorti en 1991 sur Mega Drive pour rivaliser avec Mario.
questions.explanation_en: Sonic the Hedgehog was released in 1991 on Mega Drive to compete with Mario.

questions.question_fr: Grand Theft Auto V est l'un des jeux les plus rentables de l'histoire.
questions.question_en: Grand Theft Auto V is one of the most profitable games in history.
questions.explanation_fr: GTA V (2013) a généré plus de 8 milliards de dollars, plus rentable que tout film.
questions.explanation_en: GTA V (2013) generated over $8 billion, more than any movie ever.

questions.question_fr: Quel jeu invente le concept de Battle Royale en 2017 ?
questions.question_en: Which game pioneered the Battle Royale concept in 2017?
questions.explanation_fr: PUBG (PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds) a popularisé le genre avant Fortnite.
questions.explanation_en: PUBG (PlayerUnknown's Battlegrounds) popularized the genre before Fortnite.

questions.question_fr: Sur quelle console est sorti Final Fantasy VII en 1997 ?
questions.question_en: On which console was Final Fantasy VII released in 1997?
questions.explanation_fr: Final Fantasy VII a marqué l'histoire sur PlayStation, premier de la série en 3D.
questions.explanation_en: Final Fantasy VII was a landmark on PlayStation, the first 3D entry in the series.

questions.question_fr: Dans Pokémon, le starter électrique de la 1ère génération s'appelle ___.
questions.question_en: In Pokémon, the electric starter from gen 1 is called ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Pikachu n'est pas un starter classique, mais c'est le starter de Pokémon Jaune et la mascotte.
questions.explanation_en: Pikachu isn't a classic starter, but it's the starter in Pokémon Yellow and the mascot.

questions.question_fr: Le studio CD Projekt RED est polonais.
questions.question_en: The studio CD Projekt RED is Polish.
questions.explanation_fr: CD Projekt RED, créateur de The Witcher 3 et Cyberpunk 2077, est basé à Varsovie.
questions.explanation_en: CD Projekt RED, creator of The Witcher 3 and Cyberpunk 2077, is based in Warsaw.

questions.question_fr: Quel personnage de jeu vidéo est un plombier italien ?
questions.question_en: Which video game character is an Italian plumber?
questions.explanation_fr: Mario est officiellement un plombier italien venant de Brooklyn (Mario Bros).
questions.explanation_en: Mario is officially an Italian plumber from Brooklyn (Mario Bros).

questions.question_fr: Quel jeu propose de construire avec des cubes en survie ?
questions.question_en: Which game has cube-based survival building?
questions.explanation_fr: Minecraft a été créé par Markus Persson (Notch) en 2011, racheté par Microsoft en 2014.
questions.explanation_en: Minecraft was created by Markus Persson (Notch) in 2011, bought by Microsoft in 2014.

questions.question_fr: Le jeu de société numérique populaire jouable à plusieurs en ligne s'appelle Among ___.
questions.question_en: The popular online multiplayer social deduction game is called Among ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Among Us d'InnerSloth est sorti en 2018 mais a explosé en 2020 pendant le COVID.
questions.explanation_en: Among Us by InnerSloth launched in 2018 but exploded in 2020 during COVID.
